name: Quebec Tourtiere
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the meat, onion, spices in a saucepan.
2. Add the boiling water.
3. Simmer, uncovered for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Skim off any fat.
4. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
5. Roll out half of the pastry and line a 9-inch pie plate.
6. Place the filling in the pie plate and cover with the remaining pastry.
7. Prick the pastry with a fork.
8. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until golden.
9. Serve piping hot topped with homemade ketchup or chili sauce.
SERVES 4-6
Traditionally, this is eaten hot after midnight mass on Christmas Eve.
Source: Harrowsmith Cookbook
